# headerTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text provider for the header text.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKTextProvider> @objc final var headerTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

The template supports multicolored text from this text provider.

## Accessing the Content

- **headerLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
- **body1TextProvider**: The text provider for the first row of body text.
- **body2TextProvider**: The text provider for the second row of body text.
